title: Work with MySQL Databases on Azure
summary: Work with MySQL Databases on Azure

sections.title: Work with MySQL Databases on Azure
sections.summary: Work with MySQL Databases on Azure

lessons.title: Explore MySQL Architecture
lessons.content_md:
Explore the component parts of MySQL, and learn how to find your way around Azure Database for MySQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-mysql-architecture/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Understand client-server communication in MySQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn about connection handling in MySQL, back up and restore, and the client interrace options available for MySQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/understand-client-server-communication-mysql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Understand the MySQL storage engine
lessons.content_md:
Learn about MySQL’s pluggable storage engine model, and learn about common storage engines, and those supported by Azure Database for MySQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/understand-mysql-storage-engine/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Secure MySQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn about Azure Database for MySQL security, encryption in Azure Database for MySQL, and how to configure Microsoft Entra authentication.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-mysql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Understand concurrency in MySQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn about concurrency in MySQL, including how to limit the number of connections, and when to use thread pools.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/understand-concurrency-mysql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Work with MySQL Databases on Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Work with MySQL Databases on Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
